title: Run(): don't include any default environment variables
body: When copying environment variables from the image's configuration to the spec that we'll pass to the runtime, clear out any defaults that the generate package might be supplying.  Currently, that's "$TERM".

comments.body: Change LGTM, but unhappy test results.
Added a variation on how `exec.LookPath()` resolves commands to do so using the PATH we're going to set and the rootfs that we've just mounted.
